LightningComponentBundle.description: Event team operations hub for registrations, responses, and feedback.

property.name: refreshInterval
property.label: Auto-refresh (seconds, 0=off)
property.description: How often the Registrations list silently refreshes. Set to 0 to disable.

property.name: refreshInterval
property.label: Auto-refresh (seconds, 0=off)
property.description: How often the Registrations list silently refreshes. Set to 0 to disable.
